choose.otherwise: (cmm_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR cmm_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR code_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR code_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')

mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
cmm_name DESC, cmm_id, code_id code_id DESC, cmm_id code_name DESC, cmm_id, code_id use_yn DESC, cmm_id, code_id cmm_id DESC, code_id
mapper.select:
SELECT cmm_id, cmm_name, code_id, code_name, code_tag, code_remark, user_ipnut, use_yn FROM tb_common
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT cmm_id, cmm_name, code_id, code_name, code_tag, code_remark, user_ipnut, use_yn FROM tb_common
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_common (cmm_id, cmm_name, code_id, code_name, code_tag, code_remark, user_ipnut, use_yn) VALUES (#{cmmId}, #{cmmName}, #{codeId}, #{codeName}, #{codeTag}, #{codeRemark}, ISNULL(#{userIpnut}, 'N'), ISNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'))
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_common SET cmm_name = #{cmmName}, code_name = #{codeName}, code_tag = #{codeTag}, code_remark = #{codeRemark}, use_yn = #{useYn} WHERE cmm_id = #{cmmId} AND code_id = #{codeId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_common WHERE cmm_id = #{cmmId} AND code_id = #{codeId}
